description: BNO086 9-DOF orientation sensor. I2C via Qwiic (JST-SH 4-pin). Reports quaternion, Euler angles, linear acceleration. Used in M19T for tractor heading + tilt correction.
wiring_notes: NOT 5V tolerant on Vcc — destroys chip instantly. Qwiic connector: Black=GND, Red=3.3V, Blue=SDA, Yellow=SCL. Teensy 4.1 pins: 18=SDA, 19=SCL.

description: 57mm flange closed-loop stepper servo motor. 2.3N.m holding torque. Encoder feedback. Paired with T60 drive. Used in M19T Path 2 autosteer.
wiring_notes: Encoder wiring is critical — wrong phasing = instant F-Er fault. Use shielded cable for encoder lines. Never disconnect motor phases while powered (back-EMF spike).

item_name: Rtelligent T60 Closed Loop Stepper Driver 18-68VDC 6A
description: Closed loop stepper driver for motors up to NEMA 24. 18-68VDC, 6A. RS-232 and Modbus RTU control. Paired with 57AM23ED motor for M19T Path 2.
wiring_notes: T60 speaks RS-232 (not TTL). Teensy 4.1 needs MAX232 level shifter between Pin 0/1 and T60. Motor phase wiring: U/V/W must match motor label exactly.

description: Teensy 4.1 ARM Cortex-M7 600MHz microcontroller. USB, 3x I2C, 3x SPI, 8x UART, CAN. Runs IMU fusion + WAS reading + motor control loop. Bridge to RPi4 via USB serial.
wiring_notes: Logic pins are 3.3V despite 5V USB power. Do not apply 5V to I2C pins. I2C0 = pins 18(SDA)/19(SCL). USB-C to RPi4 for serial bridge.

item_name: XL6019 DC-DC Adjustable Boost Power Supply Module 5A
description: XL6019 step-up boost converter module. Input 3-32V, output 5-35V, 5A. Adjustable via trim pot. Used to boost tractor 12V to required rail voltage where needed.
wiring_notes: Output voltage adjustable via potentiometer — set BEFORE connecting load. Verify output with multimeter. Polarity marked on board; reverse polarity = board failure.

description: u-blox ZED-F9P multi-band RTK GNSS. <1cm accuracy with RTK corrections. USB + UART. Core of M19T rover positioning. Also used as RTK base station receiver.
wiring_notes: USB powers the module — do NOT also apply external 3.3V to VCC when USB is connected. SMA antenna connector — do not operate without antenna (RF damage). One module per rover unit.
